name: MEXICO 66 TGRS
description:
The "MEXICO 66™ TGRS" shoe seamlessly combines the charm of pumps and sneakers.

■Design
A slip-on style with straps that features a slim, elegant silhouette and flower-cut Onitsuka Tiger Stripes. Based on the MEXICO 66™, it offers the sophistication of a pump while providing a soft feel and comfortable fit for the foot.

■Details
- Crossed heel reinforcement and heel flap
- Adjustable buckle with three settings for a personalized fit
- Spacious design around the toes for enhanced comfort
materials:
Upper material/surface : LEATHER･SYNTHETIC LEATHER
Outer Sole Material : RUBBER

name: Mochi Top Light Blue
description: This elevated and simple top is made from an ultra-soft 100% Cotton fabric milled in the USA. It features an elegant cap sleeve on the right arm and a gentle drape across the neckline with subtle ruching on the left shoulder. This top is also offered in white and vintage black.
